_comment: Source of truth for item categories and SLA target. Used by data/generate_synthetic_data.py to simulate realistic case timing, and by the flagging-sla-breaches skill as its SLA reference table. Edit here only - do not duplicate these numbers elsewhere.
_sla_policy: Confirmed by Noga: all three items should arrive within 30 days of request, delivered at different points during that window (staggered is normal, not a problem). A case is late only once 30 days have passed without fulfillment.
